blocks.label: Hydraulic Dock Levellers
blocks.text:
The Supplier shall supply hydraulic dock levellers:

Model: {{dockModel}}, Quantity: {{dockQty}}

Per unit:
- Platform width: {{platformWidth}} mm
- Platform length: {{platformLength}} mm
- Static load capacity: min {{staticLoad}} kg
- Dynamic load capacity: min {{dynamicLoad}} kg
- Operation: {{operation}}
- Lip length: min {{lipLength}} mm
- Working range: +{{rangeUp}} / -{{rangeDown}} mm
- Pit dimensions: {{pitLength}} × {{pitWidth}} × {{pitDepth}} mm
- Power supply: {{power}}

Safety (mandatory): automatic lip, wheel guides, safety struts, maintenance strut.

The Supplier shall confirm in the quotation: type, dynamic load capacity, pit dimensions, cycle rating, speed, CE/DoP, weight.

STM reserves the right to reject non-compliant alternatives.

variables.label: Model
variables.delegateText: Propose dock leveller for specified capacity and pit dimensions.

blocks.label: Dock Leveller Accessories
Standards
blocks.text:
All products shall comply with at minimum:

- EN 1398 (dock levellers — safety requirements)
- Machinery Directive 2006/42/EC
- CE marking mandatory — DoP to be provided per unit

Load capacity certification shall be provided demonstrating compliance with stated static and dynamic load requirements.

Attach: DoP, CE certificate, data sheets, wiring diagrams, pit dimension requirements, load capacity certification.

overrides.ch5_priceBreakdownItems:
Per piece dock leveller — complete unit including:
- Platform, lip, hydraulic unit, seals
- Control unit
- Commissioning

Per piece bumpers (per type)
Transport: per delivery

Validity: minimum {{validityDays}} days.
State if prices subject to material index.

Payment: {{paymentDays}} days after invoice.

Surcharges not stated are deemed included and cannot be invoiced separately.
overrides.ch5_surchargeItems:
- Non-standard platform dimensions (outside standard production range)
- Spare parts package
- Extended warranty beyond standard
overrides.ch6_exclusionItems:
Excluded (procured separately by STM):

- Installation and commissioning (unless quoted separately)
- Steel substructure for pit frame
- Electrical supply to control panel location
- Builder's work and pit construction
- Dock shelter
- Overhead door
- Crane and lifting equipment
- VAT

Supplier shall state additional exclusions. Items not listed and not excluded by Supplier are deemed included.

Installation instructions and documentation provided at no additional cost.
overrides.ch7_requiredDocuments:
Submit to {{stmContact}} at {{stmEmail}} before {{deadline}}.

Include:
1. Price schedule per unit
2. Data sheets per product
3. DoP + CE certificate
4. Wiring diagrams
5. Pit dimension requirements
6. Load capacity certification (static and dynamic)
7. Lead time after order confirmation
8. Warranty statement
9. General terms and conditions
10. All deviations and assumptions with justification

Incomplete quotations may be rejected.
STM is not obligated to award to lowest bidder.
This RFQ does not constitute a commitment to order.
